info.name: AnyFeast Node.js Backend API
info.description:
Complete API test collection for the AnyFeast Nutritionist App Node.js backend.

Base URL: http://localhost:5000/api/v1

item.name: Clients
item.description: CRUD operations for managing client profiles.

request.description: Retrieve all clients, ordered by created_at descending.
Retrieve a single client by their ID.
Create a new client with personal info, goals, tags, and measurements.

body.raw:
{
  "status": "active",
  "personal_info": {
    "first_name": "Priya",
    "last_name": "Mehta",
    "email": "priya.mehta@example.com",
    "phone": "+919876543210",
    "age": 29,
    "gender": "female",
    "city": "Mumbai"
  },
  "goals": [
    "Weight loss",
    "Improve gut health",
    "Reduce sugar intake",
    "Better sleep quality"
  ],
  "tags": [
    "vegetarian",
    "lactose-intolerant",
    "PCOS",
    "thyroid"
  ],
  "measurements": {
    "height_cm": 162,
    "weight_kg": 70.0,
    "bmi": 26.7,
    "body_fat_pct": 30.5,
    "waist_cm": 82
  }
}

request.description: Update an existing client's profile data.
Delete a client by their ID.

item.name: Mealplans
item.description: CRUD operations for managing meal plans.

request.description: Retrieve all meal plans, ordered by created_at descending.
Retrieve a single meal plan by its ID.
Create a new meal plan with grid, nutrition targets, grocery list, and guidelines.
Update an existing meal plan. Supports partial updates via COALESCE.
Delete a meal plan by its ID.

item.name: Consultations
item.description: CRUD operations for managing consultations. Creating a consultation also triggers an email notification to the client.

request.description: Retrieve all consultations, ordered by created_at descending.
Retrieve a single consultation by its ID.

body.raw:
{
  "client_id": "c1a2b3c4-d5e6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
  "client_name": "Priya Mehta",
  "nutritionist_id": "nutr_dr_sharma_001",
  "nutritionist_name": "Dr. Anjali Sharma",
  "type": "structured",
  "status": "scheduled",
  "scheduled_at": "2026-04-22T10:30:00.000Z",
  "medical_history": {
    "conditions": ["PCOS", "Hypothyroidism"],
    "medications": ["Metformin 500mg", "Thyroxine 50mcg"],
    "surgeries": [],
    "family_history": "Diabetes (maternal)"
  },
  "lifestyle": {
    "activity_level": "sedentary",
    "sleep_hours": 6,
    "stress_level": "high",
    "water_intake_litres": 1.5,
    "smoking": false,
    "alcohol": "occasional"
  },
  "nutrition_history": {
    "current_diet": "Irregular meals, heavy on carbs",
    "breakfast_habit": "Skips frequently",
    "eating_out_frequency": "3-4 times/week",
    "sugar_cravings": true
  },
  "supplements": {
    "current": ["Vitamin D3 — 60000 IU weekly", "Iron — 1 tab daily"],
    "recommended": ["Omega-3 Fish Oil", "Chromium Picolinate", "Inositol"]
  },
  "blood_reports": {
    "hba1c": 5.8,
    "fasting_glucose": 102,
    "tsh": 6.2,
    "vitamin_d": 18,
    "hemoglobin": 11.2,
    "report_date": "2026-04-10"
  },
  "goals": {
    "primary": "Lose 8 kg in 3 months",
    "secondary": ["Regulate menstrual cycle", "Improve energy levels", "Better skin health"]
  },
  "plan": {
    "diet_approach": "Low GI, anti-inflammatory",
    "meal_frequency": 5,
    "exercise": "30 min brisk walk daily + yoga 3x/week",
    "follow_up": "Bi-weekly check-in",
    "notes": "Start with 1400 cal/day, reassess after 2 weeks."
  },
  "consent_given": true,
  "consent_timestamp": "2026-04-20T09:00:00.000Z"
}

request.description: Create a new consultation record. This will also send an email notification to the client if their email is on file.
Update an existing consultation. Supports partial updates via COALESCE.
Delete a consultation by its ID.

item.name: Ingredients
item.description: CRUD operations for the nutrition ingredient database.

request.description: Retrieve all ingredients, ordered by created_at descending.
Retrieve a single ingredient by its ID.
Add a new ingredient to the nutrition database.
Update an existing ingredient's nutritional data.
Delete an ingredient by its ID.
Retrieve aggregated dashboard statistics (client count, mealplan count, etc.).

item.name: Messages
item.description: SMS message operations powered by Twilio.

request.description: Retrieve all messages for a specific client, ordered by timestamp ascending.
Send an SMS message to a client via Twilio and store it in the database.

item.name: Webhooks
item.description: Webhook ingestion and FCM push notification endpoints.

request.description: Ingest and store an incoming webhook event (e.g., from Twilio).
Send a Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) push notification to a client device.
